report.summary: Researched and built 2 new learn guides: RWA Tokenization ($12B+ on-chain, BlackRock BUIDL, Ondo Finance, institutional adoption) and CLARITY Act Stablecoin Yield Regulation (passive yield ban, activity-based rewards framework, DeFi protocol impact) — both covering major 2026 narratives not previously covered on degen0x.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic 1 — RWA Tokenization in 2026: Total tokenized RWAs crossed $12B in March 2026 (140% growth from $5B). BlackRock BUIDL is the largest single product at $1.9B (US Treasuries via Securitize). Ondo Finance operates USDY (~4.8% yield) and OUSG. Tokenized US Treasuries are the biggest category at $5.8B. Private credit grew 180% YoY ($3.2B+ via Centrifuge, Maple, Goldfinch). Ethereum hosts 60%+ by value; L2s (Arbitrum, Base) used for lower costs. Institutional players: Citi, HSBC, Goldman Sachs all running pilots.

Topic 2 — CLARITY Act Stablecoin Yield Regulation: US legislation banning passive stablecoin yield while allowing activity-based rewards (loyalty, payments, transactions). Senators Tillis and Alsobrooks confirmed agreement March 20, 2026 with White House backing. SEC, CFTC, Treasury to jointly define permissible rewards within 12 months. Senate Banking Committee markup targeted late April 2026. Potential headwind for DeFi lending tokens (Aave, Compound); benefits compliance-ready issuers like Circle. CoinDesk reports could 'ring-fence yield' for DeFi tokens.
Sources: CoinDesk, DL News, FinTech Weekly, CryptoTimes, Blocklr, Benzinga, RWA.xyz, Disruption Banking, Baker McKenzie.

sections.title: Content Created
items: rwa-tokenization-real-world-assets-guide-2026: ~3,000-word intermediate guide covering what RWA tokenization is, why assets are moving on-chain, how the process works (custody to DeFi integration), key protocols and products (BlackRock BUIDL, Ondo USDY/OUSG, Centrifuge, Maple Finance comparison table), institutional wave (Citi/HSBC/Goldman pilots), chains and infrastructure (Ethereum dominance, L2 expansion), risks (custodial, regulatory, liquidity, smart contract, concentration), and 6 FAQs.

clarity-act-stablecoin-yield-regulation-guide-2026: ~2,800-word intermediate guide covering CLARITY Act basics (bipartisan compromise, White House backing), the stablecoin yield problem (securities classification risk), activity-based rewards framework (6 allowed categories), banned vs allowed comparison table, impact on DeFi protocols (Aave, Compound, MakerDAO/Sky), winners and losers analysis, timeline (March 20 agreement through late April markup), and 6 FAQs.
Data file: src/data/pages/learn-20260401-v4.ts with full PageData entries for both pages (metadata, SEO config, TOC, FAQs, internal links)

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: RWA page — Title: 'RWA Tokenization: Real-World Assets On-Chain Guide 2026 | degen0x' (58 chars). Target keyword: RWA tokenization guide 2026. Schemas: Article + FAQPage (6 questions). Internal links to 5 related guides (defi-insurance, stablecoin-payments, cross-chain-bridge-security, defai-automation, dca-calculator). OG article type with publishedTime + Twitter summary_large_image.

CLARITY Act page — Title: 'CLARITY Act & Stablecoin Yield Regulation 2026 Guide | degen0x' (58 chars). Target keyword: CLARITY Act stablecoin yield 2026. Schemas: Article + FAQPage (6 questions). Internal links to 5 related pages (stablecoin-payments, defi-insurance, rwa-tokenization, defai-automation, dca-calculator). OG article type with publishedTime + Twitter summary_large_image.
Both pages include publishedTime/modifiedTime, word counts in structured data, author attribution, and cross-link to each other.

sections.title: Infrastructure Changes
items: Created data file: src/data/pages/learn-20260401-v4.ts (113 lines) with PageData entries for both pages
Both slugs marked status: 'queued' for PUBLISH_QUEUE addition
No interactive components needed — both are static learn guides with comparison tables and FAQ sections
Fixed RWA page: removed 'use client' directive (incompatible with metadata export in App Router), added proper Metadata type import
